starterTools.name: list_calendar_events
starterTools.description: List events from a Google Calendar within a time range.

inputSchema.name: calendarId
inputSchema.description: Calendar ID (use 'primary' for the main calendar)

inputSchema.name: timeMin
inputSchema.description: Start of range in RFC3339 format, e.g. 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z

inputSchema.name: timeMax
inputSchema.description: End of range in RFC3339 format, e.g. 2026-12-31T23:59:59Z

inputSchema.name: maxResults
inputSchema.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 10)

starterTools.name: create_calendar_event
starterTools.description: Create a new event in a Google Calendar.

inputSchema.name: calendarId
inputSchema.description: Calendar ID (use 'primary' for the main calendar)

inputSchema.name: start
inputSchema.description: Start time in RFC3339 format, e.g. 2026-07-01T10:00:00Z

inputSchema.name: end
inputSchema.description: End time in RFC3339 format, e.g. 2026-07-01T11:00:00Z

starterTools.name: get_calendar_event
starterTools.description: Retrieve details of a specific Google Calendar event.

inputSchema.name: calendarId
inputSchema.description: Calendar ID (use 'primary' for the main calendar)
